name: NETFLIX INC
summary: Netflix, Inc. is a global entertainment service offering TV series, films, games, and live programming across diverse genres and languages. Members pay monthly subscription fees and can stream content anytime, anywhere. Netflix offers multiple pricing plans including an ad-supported tier. The company produces original content and licenses content from studios and other rights holders, operating as a single business segment worldwide.
